ddls:
CREATE TABLE "counties" (
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each county */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the corresponding state */,
  "fips_state" TEXT /* FIPS code for the state */,
  "county_code" TEXT /* County code */,
  "county_name" TEXT /* Name of the county */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  "population_2014" INTEGER /* Population estimate for 2014 */,
  "state_fips" TEXT /* FIPS code for the state where the county is located */,
  "county_web_url" TEXT /* Official website of the county */,
  "county_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the county */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("county_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_counties_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pumas" (
  "puma_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each PUMA */,
  "puma_code" TEXT /* PUMA code */,
  "puma_name" TEXT /* Name of the PUMA */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the corresponding county */,
  "population_estimate" INTEGER /* Population estimate for the PUMA */,
  "puma_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the PUMA */,
  "population_density" REAL /* Population density of the PUMA */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("puma_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pumas_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographics" (
  "demo_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for demographic data entry */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the corresponding county */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group classification */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender classification */,
  "income" REAL /* Average income for the demographic group */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Education level of the demographic group */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity classification */,
  "employment_status" TEXT /* Employment status classification */,
  "housing_type" TEXT /* Housing type classification */,
  "health_insurance" TEXT /* Health insurance status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demo_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographics_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "allocation_factors" (
  "factor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for allocation factors */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the corresponding county */,
  "puma_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the corresponding PUMA */,
  "county_to_puma_alloc" REAL /* Allocation factor for county to PUMA */,
  "puma_to_county_alloc" REAL /* Allocation factor for PUMA to county */,
  "factor_type" TEXT /* Type of allocation factor (e.g., county to PUMA, PUMA to county) */,
  "factor_year" INTEGER /* Year the allocation factor applies to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("factor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_allocation_factors_puma_id FOREIGN KEY ("puma_id") REFERENCES pumas ("puma_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_allocation_factors_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "fips_code" TEXT /* FIPS code for the state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  "state_abbr" TEXT /* Abbreviation of the state */,
  "state_capitol" TEXT /* Capitol city of the state */,
  "state_population" INTEGER /* Population of the state */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the region */,
  "region_code" TEXT /* Code for the region (e.g., NE, MW, S, W) */,
  "region_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "geo_coordinates" (
  "geo_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for geographic coordinates */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the corresponding county */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude coordinate of the county's centroid */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude coordinate of the county's centroid */,
  "geo_name" TEXT /* Name of the geographic feature (e.g., county, city, town) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("geo_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_geo_coordinates_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "population_estimates" (
  "estimate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each estimate record */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the corresponding county */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the population estimate */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population estimate for that year */,
  "estimate_source" TEXT /* Source of the population estimate (e.g., census, survey) */,
  "estimate_method" TEXT /* Method used to calculate the population estimate (e.g., interpolation, extrapolation) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("estimate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_population_estimates_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "county_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for statistics */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the corresponding county */,
  "stat_type" TEXT /* Type of statistical measure (e.g., median income, unemployment rate) */,
  "stat_value" REAL /* Value of the statistical measure */,
  "stat_source" TEXT /* Source of the statistical data (e.g., census, survey) */,
  "stat_year" INTEGER /* Year the statistical data applies to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_county_statistics_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, researcher, admin) */,
  "user_password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed for security) */,
  "user_last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* ID of the county data being accessed */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of access */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action taken (e.g., view, download) */,
  "log_ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user's device */,
  "log_user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the user's browser */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "data_content" TEXT /* Content of the report (data in text format) */,
  "created_on" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was created */,
  "report_format" TEXT /* Format of the report (e.g., PDF, CSV, Excel) */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., generated, pending, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
